items.name: Areon Body 2 Navy (Vest)
items.description:
Disclaimer: These items use 1024p textures, which have a chance to become minimized to 128p using R6. If you're unsure about this purchase, test the item in a catalogue game first! Thanks!

Works best with this vest variation:

https://www.roblox.com/catalog/12664066261/Urban-LEO-Ballistic-vest-White-font

Introducing the Areon Body 2 by Tactical Enhancements—an extraordinary leap forward in surveillance technology. Immerse yourself in peace of mind as you navigate your duties with absolute confidence. With its rugged design, the Areon Body 2 discreetly integrates a strategically positioned switch and a single, inconspicuous button, allowing you to effortlessly capture every crucial moment of your shift.

items.name: Scrapper’s Satchel
items.description: A trusty satchel for the resourceful and the resilient. Worn-out but reliable, it holds all the essentials for a true scavenger—tools, patches, and a bit of luck. Whether you're fixing broken machines or piecing together your next great escape, this satchel has your back.
